title: Chinese Translation for tetra
description:
tetra模组的汉化材质包
The Chinese translation texturepack for tetra
body:
Unofficial translations for the mod [tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra).
# Translating
This is my personal Chinese translation for the [tetra](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra) mod, dedicated to providing a better localized experience for Tetra mod players from China. This translation project is fully open-source on [GitHub](https://github.com/Haiyan451/zh_cn_4_tetra_mod), and suggestions for improvements are welcome. This resource pack can be included in your modpack releases as long as the author is credited.
# Note
- Delayed Updates: The translation was done by me alone in my spare time, so updates may not be made immediately when the mod is updated. Once it's ready for basic use, I will release a preview version here in time. 
- Community Support: There may be shortcomings in my translation, and some errors might occur. Feel free to pull requests on the [Github](https://github.com/Haiyan451/zh_cn_4_tetra_mod/pulls) repository, or contact me directly via email(heyue2334@gmail.com).
# Original Author and Thanks
The author of the Tetra mod is [mickelus](https://modrinth.com/user/mickelus), and the original mod can be found on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/tetra). A big thank you to the author for creating such amazing content.
# Future plans
Currently, I have only packaged the Chinese translation resource pack for version 1.20.1-6.4.0. I will try to improve and provide support for other versions in the future.
